datenschutzPageHeaderInfos.title:
Privacy 
 and Security
datenschutzPageHeaderInfos.subtitle: Information about the protection of your data

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Sohblitz-Mobil takes the protection of your personal data very seriously. Your data is processed confidentially and in accordance with the GDPR and applicable data protection laws.

sections.title: Data Controller
content: Emerant dass Kuietche soh
Sohblitz-Mobil
Heinrich-Büssing-Ring 22
38102 Braunschweig
Email: sohblitz.mobil@web.de

sections.title: Collection and Use of Data
content: We collect personal data only when necessary to provide our services.
This may include cleaning services such as building cleaning or window cleaning.
Typical collected data includes name, address, phone number and email address from inquiries or contracts.
Legal basis: Article 6(1)(b) GDPR (contract performance) and Article 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest).

sections.title: Website Usage
content: Server log files temporarily store anonymized data such as IP address, browser type and date for a maximum of 7 days.
This data is used only to ensure the security of the website.
Requests sent via contact form or email are stored only for processing purposes.
The data is deleted after the request has been completed (maximum 2 years in case of warranty claims).

sections.title: Cookies and Tracking
content: This website currently does not use cookies or tracking tools.
If analytics tools are added in the future, this privacy policy will be updated accordingly.

sections.title: Data Sharing
content: Your personal data will not be shared with third parties.
Exceptions may apply for technical service providers such as hosting companies under a data processing agreement.
No data transfer to third countries takes place.

sections.title: Your Rights
content: You have the right to access, rectify, delete and restrict the processing of your data.
You also have the right to data portability.
You may object to the processing of your data at any time.
Any consent given may be withdrawn at any time.

sections.title: Data Deletion
content: Your data will be deleted as soon as it is no longer required for the purpose for which it was collected.
Legal retention obligations remain unaffected (for example 6 to 10 years for invoices).

sections.title: Data Security
content: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data.
This includes SSL encryption, password protection and access restrictions.

sections.title: Information according to §5 TMG

sections.title: Dispute Resolution
content: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution:
https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr
We are not obliged or willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.title: Scope
content: These Terms and Conditions apply to all contracts for cleaning services between Sohblitz-Mobil and the customer.

This includes building cleaning, upholstery cleaning, carpet cleaning, car interior cleaning, post-construction cleaning, office and practice cleaning, as well as window, glass, blind and shutter cleaning.
Any deviating conditions require written confirmation.

sections.title: Service Description and Customer Obligations
content: The scope of services results from the offer or booking.
The customer provides water, electricity, access and waste containers free of charge.
The rooms must be accessible and cleared.
Sohblitz-Mobil uses professional cleaning products and equipment.

sections.title: Prices and Payment
content: All prices are net plus 19% VAT.
Payment must be made within 7 days after invoicing by bank transfer.
Reminder fee: €5.
Minimum order value: €50.
Travel costs within Braunschweig: €0.50 per km.
Travel costs outside Braunschweig: €0.75 per km.

sections.title: Appointments and Cancellations
content: Appointments are binding.
Cancellations less than 24 hours before the appointment result in a 50% fee.
Customer delays extend the invoiced working time.
In case of payment delay, the obligation to provide services is suspended.

sections.title: Defects and Complaints
content: Visible defects must be reported immediately.
Sohblitz-Mobil will remedy them within 48 hours.
The correction is free of charge.
If correction fails, price reduction or contract withdrawal is possible.

sections.title: Liability
content: Liability only exists in cases of intent or gross negligence.
Damage must be reported within 48 hours.
No liability is assumed for dirt caused by the customer or force majeure.

sections.title: Data Protection
content: Personal data is used exclusively for order processing.
Further information can be found in our privacy policy.

sections.title: Termination and Contract Duration
content: One-time orders end automatically after the service is completed.
Ongoing contracts can be terminated with two weeks notice to the end of the month.
Place of jurisdiction is Braunschweig.
Changes to these terms and conditions are reserved.
By placing an order, the customer accepts these Terms and Conditions.

aboutSection.title: About Sohblitz-Mobil
aboutSection.subtitle: Professional cleaning with passion
aboutSection.text1: Sohblitz-Mobil is a modern cleaning company based in Braunschweig. Our mission is to provide clean, hygienic and comfortable spaces for our customers, whether at home, in offices or in commercial environments.
aboutSection.text2: We offer a wide range of professional cleaning services including building cleaning, upholstery cleaning, carpet cleaning, car interior cleaning as well as window and glass cleaning.
aboutSection.text3: Using professional equipment, high-quality products and a dedicated team, we ensure reliable service and high customer satisfaction.
